name: Space Age
description_short: Member-owned federal credit union serving Golden and Aurora, Colorado with expanded eligibility including those who live, work, worship, or attend school in the area.
description_long:
Space Age Federal Credit Union is a not-for-profit, member-owned credit union based in Golden and Aurora, Colorado, with a 74-year history of serving its community. The credit union recently underwent a website migration from spaceagefcu.org to spaceagecu.org in April 2026, demonstrating active digital modernization efforts.

Space Age offers a comprehensive suite of financial products including share savings accounts, youth savings accounts, checking accounts, auto loans, motorcycle loans, recreational vehicle loans, personal second mortgages and HELOCs, credit cards, and business lending options. They provide digital banking through their mobile app (available on Android and Apple), online banking portal, and in-person services at physical branch locations. The credit union also maintains surcharge-free ATM access and participates in shared branching networks.

The credit union distinguishes itself through member-focused programming including the Money Monsters & Friends youth education club, young adult checking accounts with special benefits, and financial wellness resources through GreenPath Financial Wellness partnerships. They offer competitive rates including auto loans as low as 5.70% APR, motorcycle loans as low as 6.74% APR, credit cards as low as 6.75% APR, and second mortgages as low as 7.49% APR. The organization recently expanded membership eligibility criteria to make joining easier for a broader population.

As a federally-insured credit union (NCUA), Space Age provides member protection and operates on a not-for-profit basis where earnings are returned to members rather than shareholders. However, limited information is provided on their website regarding asset size, member count, specific lending limits, or detailed fee structures, which may require direct contact for comprehensive financial comparison.
services: Youth savings accounts with special benefits
Second mortgages and HELOCs (home equity lines of credit)
Surcharge-free ATM network and shared branching access
Money Monsters & Friends youth education program
Debt consolidation and financial assistance counseling
pros: Recently expanded membership eligibility to include those who live, work, worship, or attend school in the service area, making membership more accessible
Competitive rates across multiple products: auto loans from 5.70% APR, credit cards from 6.75% APR, second mortgages from 7.49% APR
Modern digital banking platform with mobile app available on both Android and Apple, online banking, and surcharge-free ATM network
Comprehensive youth financial education program through Money Monsters & Friends club with dedicated youth savings and checking products
Free financial wellness resources through GreenPath partnership and debt consolidation options
Federal credit union with NCUA insurance protection and member-owned, not-for-profit structure
Business lending options available for members needing commercial financing
cons: Limited geographic footprint restricted to Golden and Aurora, Colorado service area only
Website lacks detailed information on specific loan limits, fee schedules, and product terms requiring direct contact for complete details
No information provided about membership requirements, deposit minimums, or account opening requirements beyond 'expanded eligibility'
Limited transparency on business lending specifics, application requirements, or approval criteria
No mention of alternative funding options, payday alternative loans (PALs), or other emergency lending products commonly offered by credit unions
best_for: Colorado residents in Golden and Aurora area who live, work, worship, or attend school within the credit union's service territory
Members seeking competitive auto and motorcycle financing with lower APRs than traditional banks
Families interested in youth financial education and developing savings habits for children through dedicated youth programs
Individuals needing consolidation options and debt management support through GreenPath partnerships
diagnosis: Space Age Federal Credit Union is best for Colorado residents in the Golden and Aurora area seeking member-owned, federally-insured banking with competitive rates on auto and motorcycle financing, plus strong youth financial education programs. The primary caveat is geographic limitation to Colorado's Front Range communities—out-of-area residents cannot join regardless of membership eligibility criteria.
typical_results_timeline: Membership approval and account opening typically takes 1-3 business days. Loan decisions are usually faster than traditional banks.
meta_title: Space Age — Credit Union in Aurora, CO | CreditDoc
meta_description: Space Age — NCUA-insured credit union in Aurora, CO. Member-owned, not-for-profit. Loans, savings, and member services.
